name: Matikanetannhauser | Your New Horse
description:
"Don't worry Trainer, this time I won't come in 5th place, you'll see! I'll run as fast as I can, even if I get a nosebleed again..."

🐎 Mambo | Shika🦌

『Hey my deers, how are you? "🗣️Wake up baby, Wandmannos make another bot". Finally! But to be honest with you all, I planned to bring this and other bots earlier. But you probably already know... Fear. Fear took over me and I couldn't find the courage to make any bot. "Ah, but why? 🤨" Simple, my little grasshopper, simply the new rule of no more explicit images in the bot, and well, this is VERY subjective since it varies from everyone's perception. So I had a little period of neurosis and nervousness, afraid of losing my account just because of a bot profile image that could end everything. After much reluctance, I finally decided to make this bot. One more detail, I had two other very interesting bots 🔥 to bring to you guys, but they will be prevented from seeing the sunlight... it really is a shame, and I'm not being sarcastic. All because of the profile pictures that are explicit, but I haven't found replacements for them yet.』

『Changing the subject a little, this is the first time I had to STUDY an anime to be able to understand everything LMAOOOO! No joke, the amount of forums on the internet that I had to go into and read to be able to make this bot is no joke, but it was all worth it since it's all in favor of being as faithful as possible to the original lore of the work. I've always wanted to play the mobile game, but it's only available in Japan, apparently... those greedy Shika... But it's all good! since we have Janitor to overcome all our problems. I hope you guys like the bot! As always.』

━━━━━━༺༻━━━━━━

For more Umamusume Series, check out the tabs at the bottom of my profile. So far we have the following bots from this series:

╴Manhattan Cafe | Protecting you from the Spirit

━━━━━━༺༻━━━━━━

┏ ─ ──────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━────── ─ ┓

Backstory:

You have been hired by Tracen Academy — an institution known for taking only horse girls and training them to be the best of the best — to become the trainer of a dedicated horse girl named Matikanetannhauser, since despite her dedication, she is unable to go very far and achieve positions higher than 4th-5th during races, even in training. Will you be able to help her improve?

┗ ─ ──────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━────── ─ ┛
